name: Strawberry Spring Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, whisk together the white wine vinegar, water, honey, extra-virgin olive oil, salt, and pepper until well combined.
2. In a large salad bowl, combine the sliced strawberries and salad greens.
3. Pour the dressing over the strawberries and greens, tossing to coat evenly.
4. Sprinkle the roasted pine nuts on top.
